stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the wishes of her constituents, even when that conflicts with the position of her party.
substantive: She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the national interest.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I can only change society if I am re-elected. So, I always make sure that I listen to voters’ most important concerns.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the wishes of her constituents, even when that conflicts with the position of her party. She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly explains how her decisions help to promote the national interest. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I can only change society if I am re-elected. So, I always make sure that I listen to voters’ most important concerns.”
